blocks.text: A very common politeness marker, used to show respect when speaking to someone older or in a formal/service context. No direct English translation — it works like a polite "yes" or softens a response.

blocks.vi: Anh chị dùng ở đây hay mang về? → Dạ, ở đây.
blocks.en: Will you eat here or take away? → Here, please.

blocks.vi: Dạ, anh chị trả tiền mặt hay thẻ?
blocks.en: Will you pay by cash or card? (polite opener)

blocks.text: "Dạ" is used especially by younger people speaking to older people, or by staff speaking to customers, to convey politeness. It can start almost any response to sound more courteous.
